title: Head of Operations (Retail)
description:
Head of Operations (Retail)

Salary Range : $6,800 - $7,800 (Depends on experience)

Location: West Singapore (with oversight across future locations)
Brand: Exciting New Snack Brand from China

Are you a strategic and hands-on operations leader ready to build something from the ground up? We are a dynamic and rapidly expanding snack brand from China, launching our first Singapore outlet in the west, with expansion plans. We are seeking an experienced Head of Operations to architect, scale, and lead our operational backbone in Singapore.

This is a foundational role. You will be responsible for turning our brand vision into a seamless, efficient, and profitable operational reality across corporate and potential franchise models.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Operational Strategy & Scaling: Design, implement, and continuously optimise all retail operations, supply chain, and logistics processes to ensure excellence from day one and support rapid multi-outlet expansion.

  • Multi-Outlet Leadership: Directly manage and mentor the Shop Manager for our flagship store while building systems and teams to support future outlets.

  • Supply Chain & Logistics Mastery: Oversee end-to-end inventory management, procurement, warehousing, and distribution. Ensure optimal stock levels, cost efficiency, and timely delivery to outlets.

  • Franchise Operations (Future-Forward): Develop and structure scalable operational frameworks, training programs, and support systems in preparation for future franchise partnerships.

  • Performance & Compliance: Establish KPIs, drive sales performance, control operational budgets, and ensure full compliance with local Singaporean health, safety, and business regulations.

  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Act as the key liaison between frontline retail, marketing, and headquarters. Be the effective communicator who aligns strategy with execution.

Who You Are (Requirements):

  • Minimum of 6 years of progressive operations management experience, with a strong preference for retail, F&B, or QSR backgrounds.

  • Proven track record of successfully managing multiple retail outlets (3+ is ideal) from operations, P&L, and people leadership perspectives.

  • Hands-on experience in supply chain, logistics, and inventory management within a fast-paced consumer goods environment.

  • An exceptional and effective communicator — fluent in English; proficiency in Mandarin is an advantage for liaising with our China HQ.

  • A strategic builder who is equally comfortable in the details as in high-level planning.

  • Strong bonus: Direct experience in managing or supporting a franchise network, including developing ops manuals and franchisee support systems.

Why Join Our Us?

  • Founding Impact: Be the operational architect for a beloved brand's entry into Singapore.

  • Growth Trajectory: Lead the function as we scale from 1 to multiple outlets across the region.

  • Competitive Package: Attractive remuneration, performance bonuses, and comprehensive benefits.

  • Dynamic Environment: A fast-paced, entrepreneurial culture where your ideas will shape our success.

Ready to build with us?
Please submit your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience in multi-outlet scaling and, if applicable, franchise operations.

We thank all applicants for their interest, but only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
